backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: adding a business information section and updating the Google Maps iframe with precise coordinates for Ghuge Medicals.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing the main App component with medical-themed styling, global CSS with OKLCH color system, and Tailwind configuration for healthcare aesthetics.
frontend/index.css: Duplicate global CSS file with OKLCH-based color variables for light and dark modes, using neutral grayscale theme (appears to be an older version before medical theme was applied).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Ghuge Medicals website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering the Ghuge Medicals website with header, business hours, contact info, embedded Google Maps with coordinates (17.8805°N, 75.4148°E), detailed business information section, about section, and footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with idle handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with medical-themed OKLCH color system featuring green (hue 160) and blue (hue 220-240) accents for both light and dark modes with professional healthcare styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point setting up QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and rendering the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with medical-themed OKLCH color tokens, custom container settings, system font stack, extended design tokens including sidebar and chart colors, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for Ghuge Medicals website, documenting 9 existing features including homepage, business hours, contact info, location display with embedded map, and medical-themed design. Contains architectural notes about the informational medical provider website structure and map coordinate updates.
